THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WASHINGTON, CLYDE FRISCO, DOLORES THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 118 TAYLOR ST. #301,S.F. $850.00 RENT, $83.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $933.00, STAYED UNTIL MAR-10-1997, LEASE FORFEITED, UNLAWFUL DETAINER DAMAGES OF $14.17 PER DAY FROM 2-1-97 UNTIL MARCH 10, 1997,TOTAL AMENDED JUDGMENT $1499.70
